active.name: Carpe Diem Reverse Shell PTB Derby (Natural, 2001)
active.notes: EU 45 · Italy · **Collectible** — Horween vamp stamp dated 2001 from Carpe Diem's peak period under Maurizio Altieri · Reverse-side-out shell aged into polished chromatic warm chestnut-brown patina over 20+ years · Low-shoe derby (corrected from prior boot tagging) · CARPE DIEM era (foundational, predates m_moriabc). Serves the m_moriabc triad's PAST role by interpretation only — it is a Carpe Diem piece, NOT a literal m_moriabc "A" object. Pairs conceptually with the (unrealized) m_moriabc "present" chapter and a future slow Altieri C commission. Subject of direct IG dialogue with Maurizio Altieri (Jan 2026).

retired.name: Crockett & Jones Full-Brogue George Boot (Chestnut) — John Winter SMU
retired.condition: Upper good; sole & heel worn (resole due)
retired.notes: C&J HAND GRADE SMU — imported from England by John Winter. Full-brogue GEORGE BOOT (corrected: not a single monk). Ankle-height boot with single strap-and-brass-buckle closure (the George boot's signature), full-brogue wingtip + medallion toe, extensive perforation/gimping along every seam (strap brogued too). Chestnut calf. Last 330 (original C&J Hand Grade last). Insole stamp: O22207 / 251 / 330 / 9½ D. Made in England, leather sole with metal heel segment. Discontinued/archival Hand Grade SMU. Care: Renovateur + Saphir 37 + Neutral wax.
